title: Assign a team member as the project/task leader
excerpt: All our projects and tasks have multiple team members, usually from different departments. There is often confusion on who is ultimately responsible for overseeing the task and working with the team to get it done. Is th…

posts.author: sean.jackson (Sean Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: All our projects and tasks have multiple team members, usually from different departments. There is often confusion on who is ultimately responsible for overseeing the task and working with the team to get it done. Is there a way to set a team member as the leader when adding multiple entries to the Person column?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sean.jackson - at this time no there is not. In these cases, we would just utilize a second people column to designate the lead.

Thanks,
Mark
